message:
fix(gui): clamp WebGPU surface dimensions to prevent zero-size panics

Add clamp_surface_dimension_for_configuration() clamping pixel dimensions
to [1, u32::MAX] before configuring the wgpu surface. Prevents panics
from zero-size surfaces on minimize or resize transients.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
